signals.note: T4 · by Jul 3 — 912 bu (10% of 9,115) | Final scheduled tranche — completes the season marketing plan

call.headline: Sell ~912 bu corn now.
call.detail: Corn is in a scheduled sale window — a planned, time-based tranche priced on the marketing plan's calendar rather than on today's market. Final scheduled tranche — completes the season marketing plan.
